title: Shrapnel Shard
description: Shrapnel Shard adds shrapnel to the Satsu Iron Man Addon. Surving a nearby TNT blast grants you the Arc Reactor.
body:
# Shrapnel Shard
Shrapnel Shard is a companion mod for the Satsu Iron Man Addon, 
bringing the dark side of the Arc Reactor to Minecraft. 
Just like Tony Stark, wearing the Arc Reactor comes at a cost.

⚠️ Features:
- Palladium Poisoning: Wearing the Arc Reactor slowly poisons you with palladium, 
  increasing by 1.1% every minute.
- Lithium Dioxide: A treatment item that reduces palladium poisoning by 10%. 
  Use it wisely, it has a 5 minute cooldown.
- Chlorophyll Drink: A weaker but more accessible treatment. 
  Don't drink too much or you'll regret it.
- Palladium Poisoning Control Device: Right-click to check your current poisoning level.
- Technology Armor Warning: Wearing technology armor while poisoning exceeds 60% 
  will trigger a JARVIS warning after 5 minutes.
- /palladiumpoisoning Command: Manage poisoning levels with simple commands.

📦 Requirements:
- Satsu Iron Man Addon

📁 Installation:
- Place the mod in your mods folder!

---
*Made by shady1545 | Special thanks to robotic1545 for assistance*
